ogTitle: Llowalong vs Loch Sport: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Llowalong and Loch Sport.
heading: Llowalong vs Loch Sport — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Llowalong, Victoria and Loch Sport, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Llowalong has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Loch Sport (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Llowalong or Loch Sport safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Llowalong has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Loch Sport scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Llowalong scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Loch Sport scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Llowalong or Loch Sport?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Llowalong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
